Alvarlegt flugatvik TF-KFD (Diamond DA-40) nálægt Geysi

On 20 October 2013 the pilot of TF-KFD experienced an engine failure and made a forced landing near Geysir. The final report is written in English because the engine manufacturer is not Icelandic.

Skýrsla

Flugslys TF-ZZZ í Fluggörðum við BIRK

Þann 6. ágúst 2013 varð flugslys á flugvél TF-ZZZ í Fluggörðum við Reykjavíkurflugvöll. Flugmaðurinn slasaðist ekki.

Bróðabirgðaskýrsla TF-MYX

Bráðabirgðaskýrsla vegna flugslyss TF-MYX.

Flugumferðaratvik milli loftfara TF-DRO og TF-KFB.

TF-FIJ on final approach to Keflavik Airport (BIKF)

Final report regarding TF-FIJ on final approach to Keflavik Airport on 26 February 2013.
